report.summary: Day 70 standup #17: Since v15, build shipped Fusaka/Glamsterdam + AI Agent Wallets guides (6,600 words), design polished both with OG images + UX (publish dates, TOC focus, card-style related reading), community drafted 5 tweets + 2 SVG cards (BTC $71K, Extreme Fear Day 47). REGRESSION: TS errors spiked 25→42 (crypto-index-funds JSX bug). Publish blocked — 2 queued pages missing page.tsx. 690 uncommitted files, git locks Day 7. 79 agent runs today ($6,680).

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v15: Full 6-agent rotation completed — build-v14 (Fusaka + AI Agent Wallets), design-v13 (2 OG images + UX polish), community (5 tweets + 2 SVG cards), eod-v15 (QA regression flagged), publish-v8 (blocked — missing page.tsx), plus this standup.

BUILD-V14 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Ethereum Fusaka & Glamsterdam Upgrade Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, PeerDAS EIP-7594, 12 EIPs, danksharding roadmap) and AI Agent Wallets & Autonomous Payments Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, x402 protocol, Alchemy agentic wallets, World AgentKit, $3-5T market). 6 FAQs per page with JSON-LD schema. Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

DESIGN-V13 OUTPUT: 2 branded OG SVGs (Fusaka purple-blue Ethereum gradient, AI Wallets cyan-purple AI gradient). UX: visible publish dates, keyboard focus ring styles (WCAG), card-style related reading with hover-lift transitions. Static OG SVGs replace dynamic /api/og for faster social previews.

COMMUNITY OUTPUT: 5 tweets drafted (BTC $71K surge, Bitmine $138M ETH thread, Resolv $80M breach, F&G historical at 8, Fed Miran dissent). 2 SVG social cards (BTC $71K recovery, Extreme Fear Day 47). Discord briefing + newsletter v6 addendum #3. Content calendar v10 with 12 posts through Mar 29.

PUBLISH-V8 RESULT: BLOCKED — 2 queued pages (best-perpetual-dex-comparison-2026, cross-chain-bridge-security-guide-2026) missing page.tsx files. Cannot promote. No deploy triggered. Production still on vwbUJnu7E from prior cycle.
EOD-V15 REGRESSION: TS errors spiked 25→42 (+17). New JSX syntax errors in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped '>' in JSX). 690 uncommitted changes (+4). 105 orphan slugs (+2).

MARKET CONTEXT: BTC $71,000 (+5% on Trump Iran postponement). F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, Day 47+). Bitmine $138M ETH institutional buy. Morgan Stanley BTC ETF updated. Resolv Labs $80M breach. Fed held rates, Miran dissented 25bps cut.
SEO: FAQPage JSON-LD on 179+ learn pages (deployed in prior cycle). New Fusaka + AI Wallets pages have Article + FAQ combined schema. 4 pages now have branded static OG images for social sharing.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v15: Build-v14 (2 guides + FAQ schema), design-v13 (2 OG images + UX polish), community (5 tweets + 2 SVG cards + newsletter + calendar), eod-v15 (QA flagged regression), publish-v8 (blocked). 5 agents + this standup = 6 runs, $497 human-equivalent.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 30+ learn guides built, 24+ OG images, 56+ social posts + 22 SVG cards, 15 QA cycles, 14 design audits, 79 agent runs across ~13+ rotations.
NEW ISSUE [P1]: 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE missing page.tsx (perp-dex-comparison, bridge-security). Build scaffolded them but files not created. Next build cycle must fix.
NEW REGRESSION [P2]: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx has JSX syntax errors (TS1003, TS1382). Will fail to render if ignoreBuildErrors disabled.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. All git commit/push blocked. Requires: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — Jefe's manual intervention needed.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes. 4/6 routes lack fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 2 pages with use-client + metadata conflict (unichain, appchains).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 105 orphan slugs without page.tsx. 42 TS errors across 2 files.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY (P0, Day 7): 690 uncommitted files. FAQPage JSON-LD on 179+ pages, 30+ new guides, 24+ OG images — all blocked from production. Single command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit → push → Vercel auto-deploy. Every hour without this wastes massive content investment.

PRIORITY 2 — FIX MISSING PAGE.TSX FOR QUEUED PAGES: Build-v14 added 2 pages to queue but publish-v8 found perp-dex-comparison and bridge-security missing page.tsx. Also fix crypto-index-funds JSX errors. Next build cycle must address before more scaffolding.

PRIORITY 3 — REFILL PUBLISH QUEUE WITH HIGH-VALUE TOPICS: Queue depleted to 2 blocked pages. Suggested topics leveraging current market narratives: 'best crypto exchanges 2026', 'bitcoin halving countdown', 'stablecoin regulation guide' (Resolv breach + CLARITY Act angle).

STRATEGIC NOTE: The content flywheel is producing but deploy pipeline is broken. 30+ guides, 56+ social posts, 22 SVG cards, newsletter — all created today but only previously-committed content is live. BTC $71K + Extreme Fear Day 47 + institutional accumulation = optimal timing for fresh content. Deploy unblocking is the single highest-leverage action.
